title: Ethiopian Stir Fry Noodles
description: A spicy and flavorful stir fry made with Ethiopian spices, noodles, and egg. This dish is perfect for a quick and delicious meal.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to package instructions and set aside.
Heat the garlicky stir in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Ethiopian spices to the skillet and stir for 1 minute.
Push the spices to one side of the skillet and crack in the eggs. Scramble the eggs until cooked through.
Mix the eggs with the spices and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until combined with the egg and spice mixture.
